header.description: One-row header dataset containing plant metadata and date range parameters

rows.description: Detail rows showing material consumption per bin after MELT transformation

totals.description: Aggregate totals across all materials in filtered dataset

semantics: Filter recipes by date range (start_time between from_date and to_date) and recipe_name matching recipe_code parameter. Unpivot 12 bin columns into normalized rows, excluding empty bins. Calculate error metrics and aggregate totals.
transformations: MELT bin1_content through bin12_content into material_name column
MELT bin1_sp through bin12_sp into set_wt column (aligned with material_name)
MELT bin1_act through bin12_act into ach_wt column (aligned with material_name)
Filter out rows where material_name is empty or null
Compute row_sl_no as sequential row number
Compute row_error as ach_wt minus set_wt
Compute row_error_pct as row_error divided by set_wt
Aggregate sum of set_wt, ach_wt, and row_error for totals
Compute total_error_pct as total_error divided by total_set_wt
